name: QA 1483
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1483

look for bad syslog entries



Copyright (c) 2024 Ken McDonell.  All Rights Reserved.



check-group-exclude: pmlogger_check pmlogger_daily



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu1804-i386-container reproduce
